info.title: ISRO ISTRAC SOC AI Platform
info.description:
AI-Driven Security Analytics Platform for ISRO ISTRAC Bengaluru.

        ## Architecture
        This platform ingests security logs from Elasticsearch, detects anomalies
        using ML models (Isolation Forest, Autoencoder, LSTM), scores threats,
        and provides natural language investigation via an SLM assistant.

        ## Authentication
        All endpoints require Bearer token authentication (see /api/auth/login).

        ## Rate Limits
        - /api/slm/chat: 60 requests/minute
        - /api/alerts: 300 requests/minute

get.description: Returns the live in-memory state of the ingestion scheduler.

post.description: Manually triggers the ingestion pipeline synchronously.

get.description: Queries soc-feature-vectors for most recent window_bucket, returns up to 100 records.
Returns feature vector history for entity (last 24h).
Fetches ML processed alerts querying across elastic fields scaling with deep pagination arrays.

get.description: Generates complex ES aggregations tracking pipeline security throughput explicitly mapping to React UI dashboards.

post.description: Manually forces Threat Engine execution spanning the whole extraction pipeline synchronously.

get.description: Resolves singular specific alerts returning precise SHAP features and translation mappings.

patch.description: Allows UI triage handlers mapping interactive state flows directly natively over ES document fields.

get.description: Constructs localized chronological execution limits tracking identically mapped anomalies spanning exact same entities.

post.description: Submits manual triage labels dropping mapped boundaries sequentially matching ES indices.

get.description: Calculates active system efficacy identifying accurate TP vs FP suppression bounds.
Generates transparency exposing tracking metrics identifying blocked mapping entities.

post.description: Triggers complete baseline ML training pipeline executing arrays synchronously asynchronously in background routines.
Executes incremental bounds retraining overlapping existing artifacts mapping new specific explicit feature vectors.

get.description: Retrieves ephemeral background ML training job contexts safely tracking local execution metrics.
Generates complete model versioning mapping cleanly leveraging underlying MLFlow experiment log pipelines.

post.description: Streams raw SLMEngine outputs utilizing Transformers TextIteratorStreamer and Server-Sent Events natively.
